data.body: PASS 1 (T1 prior-art/novel-architecture overlay): No findings. The Cluster 2 plan is a pure in-file DRY consolidation — collapsing two structurally identical jittered-backoff functions into one parameterized `_jittered_backoff(...)` helper with thin constant-binding wrappers. No bright-line fires (no external integration, new dependency, security/auth, novel architecture, performance target, or migration), so the prior-art overlay is not-applicable. The chosen pattern (parameterize duplicated math, keep wrappers) is the established Rule-of-Three response and the plan explicitly scopes out a universal `retry()`/`_retry.py` abstraction (AC4) and notes the audit found this as the single genuine in-file duplication. Affirmed.
